headline: Schlage Launches Sense Pro™ Smart Deadbolt, Redefining Home Access Through Schlage Converge™ Technology with Ultra Wideband
summary: Schlage®, a trusted leader in home security and access solutions for more than a century, announces that the Schlage Sense Pro™ Smart Deadbolt will be available for purchase beginning June 29, 2026.
